title: Carosi Alpha Hospital
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Carosi Alpha Hospital''' was the largest [[Medcenter/Legends|hospital]] on [[Carosi XII]]. It received a number of patients from the hospital [[Starship/Legends|ship]] ''[[Sudden Restoration]]''. On one occasion it received a wounded [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] who was being hunted by a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]]. The hunter infiltrated the facility, but was prevented from carrying out their mission.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1992-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two]]''
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
